purpose: Ground-truth partner skill amendments verified in-game (screenshots/notes). Applied over scraped sources when building resolved.json. Never mixed into source scrape files.

fields.description: When activated, equips to the player and becomes a shield. Sometimes drops Wool when assigned to Ranch.

entries.notes: Palpedia Stats tab. Game8 paraphrases; wiki-gg and paldb match in-game text.

fields.description: While in party, Cattiva helps carry supplies, increasing the player's max carrying capacity by 100. (Does not stack)

entries.notes: Palpedia shows fixed 100 (not paldb range 100~200). wiki-gg uses team and omits number; game8 paraphrases.

fields.description: Sometimes lays an Egg when assigned to Ranch.

entries.notes: wiki-gg and paldb match; game8 paraphrases as produces Eggs.

fields.description: While in party, increases player's and Pals' damage to enemies afflicted with Muddy by 50%. (Does not stack)

entries.notes: Palpedia shows fixed 50% (not paldb range 50~65). game8 omits percent and stack note. wiki-gg missing Pierdon.

fields.description: When activated, leaps onto the player's head and uses a submachine gun to follows up player attacks.

entries.notes: Palpedia Stats tab. In-game has grammar 'to follows up'. paldb matches; wiki-gg corrects to 'follow'; game8 rewrites with Submachine Gun requirement.

fields.description: When activated, Fuack body surfs towards an enemy and slams into them.

entries.notes: paldb matches. wiki-gg uses toward (not towards). game8 rewrites with Water damage / soak wording.

fields.description: When activated, Fuack Ignis fire surfs towards an enemy and slams into them.

entries.notes: paldb + game8 match. wiki-gg has Activated capital A and 'towards and enemy' (missing an).

fields.description: Sometimes digs up items from the ground when assigned to Ranch.

entries.notes: paldb matches. wiki-gg same text minus trailing period. game8 lists specific drop types instead of generic items.

fields.description: While in party, modifies the performance of the equipped glider. Prevents fall damage and extends the duration of high-speed gliding.

entries.notes: paldb matches (incl. fall damage line). wiki-gg uses team and omits fall damage. game8 paraphrases speed/movement and says team.

fields.description: While in party, modifies the performance of the equipped glider. Prevents fall damage and extends the duration of high-speed gliding.

entries.notes: paldb matches. game8 adds 'the' before party. wiki-gg uses team and omits fall damage.

fields.description: While in party, increases Attack of Neutral Pals by 15%. (Does not stack) Sometimes drops Wool when assigned to Ranch.

entries.notes: Fixed 15% not paldb range. wiki-gg omits percent and stack note; game8 paraphrases produces Wool.

fields.description: When activated, Croajiro Noct channels its loyalty and puffs up its abdomen to store energy. Climbing on top will propel the player high into the air. While airborne before landing, the player's Attack is increased by 50%.

entries.notes: In-game literally says Croajiro Noct on base Croajiro (shared/bug text). Fixed 50% not range. wiki-gg/game8 reword activation and omit or soften airborne Attack.

fields.description: When activated, Croajiro Noct channels its loyalty and puffs up its abdomen to store energy. Climbing on top will propel the player high into the air. While in party, improves player's and Pals' Dark damage to enemy weak points by 25%. (Does not stack)

entries.notes: Fixed 25% weak-point Dark damage not range. wiki-gg/game8 say team Attack of Dark pals instead of weak points.

fields.description: While in party, Herbil uses its healing powers to restore 30% of the player's Max Health when incapacitated.

entries.notes: Fixed 30% restore not range. wiki-gg says revive; game8 omits Herbil name and percent.

fields.description: While in party, restores 20% of the player's Health when Health falls below 30%. (Does not stack) (120-second cooldown after activation)

entries.notes: Passive low-HP heal with fixed 20% and 120s CD — not activation spout. wiki-gg/game8 describe old active heal.

fields.description: While in party, improves logging efficiency by 30% and reduces weight of all types of wood by 40%. (Does not stack)

entries.notes: Fixed 30% logging + 40% wood weight. paldb ranges. wiki-gg no numbers. game8 omits percents.

fields.description: While in party, increases the player's melee weapon damage by 10%. (Does not stack)

entries.notes: Fixed 10% melee weapon damage. paldb range. game8 omits percent. wiki-gg missing.

fields.description: While at a base, increases the Gathering Work Suitability Level for all other Base Pals by +1. (Does not stack)

entries.notes: paldb matches. game8 says Sustainability and omits +1/stack. wiki-gg missing.

fields.description: When activated, equips Jolthog to the player to be thrown at an enemy, causing an Electric explosion upon impact.

entries.notes: paldb matches. wiki-gg player's hand/electrical. game8 adds stun/catch and level scaling.

fields.description: When activated, equips Jolthog Cryst to the player to be thrown at an enemy, causing an Ice explosion upon impact.

entries.notes: paldb matches. wiki-gg icy explosion. game8 freeze/catch and level scaling.

fields.description: When activated, Depresso chugs an entire energy drink, increasing its Movement Speed and Work Speed by 100%. Sometimes drops Venom Gland when assigned to Ranch.

entries.notes: Fixed 100% Move+Work Speed. paldb range. wiki-gg omits Work Speed and percent. game8 movement only + Venom Glands plural.

fields.description: When activated, the player equips a Rocket Launcher to fire Pengullet as ammunition. Pengullet explodes on impact and is incapacitated.

entries.notes: paldb matches. wiki-gg on contact. game8 lethal/Neutral stun rewrite.

fields.description: When activated, the player equips Pengullet Lux to fire Rocket Launcher as ammunition. Pengullet Lux explodes on impact and is incapacitated.

entries.notes: In-game wording swaps equip subject vs base Pengullet (matches paldb). wiki-gg/game8 use parallel Rocket Launcher equips wording.

fields.description: While in party, Fire Pals drop 40% more items when defeated. (Does not stack)

entries.notes: Fixed 40%. paldb range. wiki-gg fighting together no %. game8 active Pal only.

fields.description: While in party, improves player's and Pals' Water damage to enemy weak points by 25%. (Does not stack)

entries.notes: Water weak-point damage 25% not Fire drop buff. wiki-gg wrong skill effect. game8 vague. paldb range.

fields.description: While in party, increases Attack of Dark Pals by 15%. (Does not stack)

entries.notes: Fixed 15%. paldb range. wiki-gg no %. game8 active Dark Pal only.

fields.description: Can be ridden. While in party, increases Kingpaca's Defense and Movement Speed. Sometimes drops Wool when assigned to Ranch.

entries.notes: Skill name Pacapaca Wool (not wiki Pecapaca). paldb matches. game8 reorders produces Wool. wiki-gg missing Kingpaca buff.

fields.description: Can be ridden. This Pal's Defense and Movement Speed increase by 5% for each Melpaca in party.

entries.notes: Fixed 5% per Melpaca. wiki-gg still has carry weight skill (wrong). paldb range. game8 omits percent.

fields.description: Can be ridden. This Pal's Defense and Movement Speed increase by 5% for each Melpaca in party.

entries.notes: Fixed 5%. game8 ok on fixed %. paldb range. wiki-gg wrong name King of Muscles + carry weight.

fields.description: While in party, appears near the player. Attacks hostile enemies with Dark magic bullets. These bullets will not reduce the target's Health below 1.

entries.notes: paldb matches incl. HP floor 1. wiki-gg follow-up bullets outdated. game8 level scaling paraphrase.

fields.description: When activated, Tanzee will mercilessly fire an assault rifle at nearby enemies for a limited time.

entries.notes: paldb+wiki-gg ok. game8 neutral damage paraphrase.

fields.description: When activated, Tanzee Ignis will mercilessly fire a Fire assault rifle at nearby enemies for a limited time.

entries.notes: paldb+game8 ok. wiki-gg missing.

fields.description: When activated, detects the location of nearby Pal Effigies.

entries.notes: paldb ok. game8 paraphrase. wiki-gg wrong Dark attack type (outdated).

fields.description: While in party, recovers Health of the player and Party Pals by 0.1% per second outside of combat. (Does not stack) Sometimes drops Flame Organ when assigned to Ranch.

entries.notes: Fixed 0.1%/s. paldb range. wiki ranch only. game8 omits rate.

fields.description: While in party, increases Defense of Fire Pals by 15%. (Does not stack) Sometimes drops Flame Organ when assigned to Ranch.

entries.notes: Fixed 15% Defense Fire Pals + Flame Organ ranch. wiki Attack wrong. game8 active-only.

fields.description: Sometimes digs up Gold Coin when assigned to Ranch.

entries.notes: paldb ok. wiki a Ranch. game8 produces Gold Coins.

fields.description: Can be ridden. While mounted, increases efficiency of destroying Stone by 500%.

entries.notes: Fixed 500% Stone. paldb range. wiki boulders no %. game8 mining efficiency.

fields.description: When activated, equips to the player and transforms into a flamethrower.

entries.notes: paldb+wiki-gg ok. game8 harness rewrite.

fields.description: When activated, equips to the player and attacks using frigid air.

entries.notes: wiki=When activated, equips to the player and attacks using frigid air.; game8=When activated, equips to the player and attacks using frigid air.; paldb=When activated, equips to the player and attacks using frigid air.

fields.description: While in party, modifies the performance of the equipped glider. Enables gentle floating while gliding for an extended time.

entries.notes: paldb matches. wiki/game8 team wording.

entries.notes: paldb matches. wiki team; game8 the party.

fields.description: Can be ridden. Can perform a double jump while mounted and increases lumbering efficiency by 220%.

entries.notes: Fixed 220% lumbering + double jump. paldb range. wiki/game8 no percent.

fields.description: Can be ridden. Moves slightly faster than most mounts.

fields.description: Sometimes drops Red Berries from its back when assigned to Ranch. While in party, restores 100 Pal's Hunger to the Pal with the lowest Hunger every 5 minutes. (Does not stack)

entries.notes: Fixed 100 Hunger every 5 min. paldb range. wiki ranch only. game8 soft Hunger.

fields.description: Sometimes drops Venom Gland from its back when assigned to Ranch. While in party, restores 100 Pal's Hunger to the Pal with the lowest Hunger every 5 minutes. (Does not stack)
